_comment: Weekly dashboard targets for artisyn-kpi dashboard (STORY-0033 / ADR-0012 §4). Overrideable per workspace — place this file at adlc/dashboard-targets.json. stage_targets_hours keys must match the status names in your adlc/status-model.json. RAG thresholds: *_max = lower-is-better (green if value <= green_max); *_min = higher-is-better (green if value >= green_min). Tune after 2-4 weeks of real baseline data.

throughput_per_week._comment: Tickets reaching Done per ISO week. Higher is better.

cycle_time_days_median._comment: Median cycle time (first in-flight entry -> Done) in days. Lower is better.

agentic_share_pct._comment: Percentage of transitions performed by agents. Higher is better.
